title: EU clears major hurdle to finalize U.S. trade pact — and sidestep Trump tariff hikes
summary_full: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen on Wednesday welcomed a provisional agreement on legislation to remove import duties on U.S. goods.
summary_public: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen on Wednesday welcomed a provisional agreement on legislation to remove import duties on U.S. goods.
